---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an enhancement or new capability
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

<!-- What user problem are you trying to solve? "I'd like X" is fine, but "When I'm doing X, Y is painful because Z" is much more useful. -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- How you think it should work. Sketches, ASCII diagrams, or rough API shapes are very welcome. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Other approaches you thought about and why you rejected them. -->

## Scope check

- [ ] This is a small change (one route, one component, one config knob)
- [ ] This is a medium change (touches a few files, may need a migration)
- [ ] This is a large change (architectural — new subsystem, breaking change, or affects many files)

## Are you willing to send a PR?

- [ ] Yes, I'd like to work on this
- [ ] Maybe, with some guidance
- [ ] No — flagging the idea for the maintainers

## Additional context

<!-- Links to related issues, similar features in other projects, mockups, screenshots. -->
